headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Fiserv, Lowers Price Target to $65
summary: UBS  analyst Timothy Chiodo   maintains Fiserv (NASDAQ:FISV) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $70 to $65.

headline: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Fiserv After Q1 Results
summary: Fiserv Inc. (NASDAQ:FISV) reported mixed Q1 results, with earnings beating expectations but revenue falling. Analysts lowered price targets.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Fiserv, Lowers Price Target to $75
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Daniel R. Perlin   maintains Fiserv (NASDAQ:FISV) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $85 to $75.

headline: Fiserv moves through ‘transition year’
summary: During its first-quarter earnings report Tuesday, the payments processor’s CEO cited new executive hires and cost cuts aimed at reviving growth.

headline: Mizuho Maintains Outperform on Fiserv, Lowers Price Target to $90
summary: Mizuho  analyst Dan Dolev   maintains Fiserv (NASDAQ:FISV) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $100 to $90.
